photos.location_detail: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of the Piazza dei Miracoli (Square of Miracles) in Pisa, Italy, showing the Cathedral (Duomo di Pisa) with its distinctive Romanes
photos.description_zh: 一張義大利比薩奇蹟廣場的旅行照片，畫面中可見比薩大教堂及其獨特的羅馬式建築與圓頂，右後方則是舉世聞名的比薩斜塔。照片從草坪對面拍攝，教堂底部可見零星的觀光客。
photos.location: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy

photos.location_detail: Mediterranean Sea — Pacific Princess cruise ship, with port stops in Italy (Pisa, Rome) and Spain (Barcelona)
photos.description_en: A professionally assembled souvenir photo collage from a Pacific Princess 12-day Mediterranean cruise sailing from Barcelona to Venice. The central ph
photos.description_zh: 這是一張太平洋公主號郵輪的紀念照片拼貼，記錄了一次從巴塞隆納到威尼斯的十二天地中海之旅。中央照片是一對亞裔夫婦在船上的合影——男士穿著西裝打領帶，女士穿著紅色上衣。周圍的照片展示了船上的歌舞表演、太平洋公主號郵輪的外觀、比薩斜塔、羅馬的古典建築，以及郵輪碼頭的外觀。
photos.location: Mediterranean Sea — Pacific Princess cruise ship, with port stops in Italy (Pisa, Rome) and Spain (Barcelona)

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy — Basilica di Santa Croce
photos.description_en: A travel photo of the Basilica di Santa Croce in Florence, Italy, showing the iconic neo-Gothic marble facade with its pointed arches, large rose wind
photos.description_zh: 一張義大利佛羅倫斯聖十字聖殿的旅遊照片，展示了教堂著名的新哥德式大理石立面，包括尖拱門、大型玫瑰窗及大衛之星圖案。夏日陽光下，一群遊客正站在教堂的台階上，右側可見鐘樓。
photos.location: Florence, Italy — Basilica di Santa Croce

photos.location_detail: Pisa, Italy — Piazza dei Miracoli, in front of the Baptistery of St. John
photos.description_en: A mother and two teenage children pose in front of the Pisa Baptistery (Battistero di San Giovanni) in Pisa, Italy during a summer trip. The iconic cy
photos.description_zh: 一位母親帶著兩個十多歲的孩子，在義大利比薩的聖若望洗禮堂前合影留念。背景中可見這座標誌性的圓柱形羅馬式哥德建築，在藍天下格外壯觀，四周有其他遊客和金屬圍欄。一家人看起來正在歐洲旅遊，穿著輕便夏裝，適合夏日觀光。
photos.location: Pisa, Italy — Piazza dei Miracoli, in front of the Baptistery of St. John

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy — Riva degli Schiavoni, in front of the Vittorio Emanuele II monument, with the Londra Palace hotel visible behind
photos.description_en: A woman in a red polka-dot blouse and black skirt poses in front of the equestrian monument to Vittorio Emanuele II on the Riva degli Schiavoni waterf
photos.description_zh: 一位身穿紅色圓點上衣和黑色裙子的女士，在威尼斯斯拉夫人堤岸的維托里奧·埃馬努埃萊二世騎馬雕像前留影。背景可見倫德拉宮殿酒店的招牌，周圍有其他遊客經過，天氣看起來相當宜人。
photos.location: Venice, Italy — Riva degli Schiavoni, in front of the Vittorio Emanuele II monument, with the Londra Palace hotel visible behind

photos.location_detail: Leaning Tower of Pisa, Pisa, Italy
photos.description_en: Three people — a father with his teenage daughter and son — pose together in front of the Leaning Tower of Pisa in Italy. The father stands in the cen
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在義大利比薩斜塔前合影留念。父親站在中間，穿著淺色polo衫，雙手搭在兩個孩子的肩上；左邊的女兒穿著碎花上衣和牛仔褲，右邊的兒子穿著黑色搖滾樂團T恤。背景可見金屬圍欄和其他遊客，拍攝時斜塔正處於修復封閉期間。
photos.location: Leaning Tower of Pisa, Pisa, Italy

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — near Vatican City, with St. Peter's Basilica visible in background
photos.description_en: A family of three poses for a photo on a cobblestone street near the Vatican in Rome, Italy, with the dome of St. Peter's Basilica and an obelisk clea
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在羅馬梵蒂岡附近的石板街道上合影留念，背景可見聖伯多祿大殿的圓頂和方尖碑。左邊是一位穿著圖案T恤和牛仔褲的少女，中間是穿白色polo衫的父親，右邊是穿深藍色洋裝、頭上架著太陽眼鏡並挎著手提包的母親。明亮的夏日陽光和輕鬆的姿態，呈現出一趟愉快的歐洲家庭旅行。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — near Vatican City, with St. Peter's Basilica visible in background

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi)
photos.description_en: A travel photo of the Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi) in Rome, Italy, taken on a bright sunny day. The iconic Baroque fountain is shown in full gran
photos.description_zh: 這是一張在晴朗天氣下拍攝的羅馬許願池（特雷維噴泉）旅遊照片。壯觀的巴洛克式噴泉以海神尼普頓為中心，兩旁有寓意雕像，前景可見數位遊客以剪影姿態站在噴泉邊緣觀賞。建築立面上可見教宗克萊孟十二世和本篤十四世的拉丁文銘刻。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi)

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: Tourists in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, surrounded by the famous pigeons. St. Mark's Basilica is clearly visible in the bac
photos.description_zh: 威尼斯聖馬可廣場上的觀光客，四周佈滿了廣場上著名的鴿子。背景中可清楚看到聖馬可大教堂的拜占庭式圓頂和哥德式尖塔。前景中一位穿著白色印花T恤的年輕人正站在鴿群中，旁邊有一位戴草帽、穿紅色上衣的男子——這是九○年代威尼斯觀光的經典畫面。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Vatican City — St. Peter's Square, in front of St. Peter's Basilica, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: Two Asian males — likely a father and teenage son — pose together in St. Peter's Square in front of the iconic facade of St. Peter's Basilica in Vatic
photos.description_zh: 兩位亞裔男性——看起來是一對父子——在梵蒂岡聖伯多祿廣場上合影，身後是宏偉的聖伯多祿大殿正面。這是一個陽光明媚的夏日，廣場上可見許多遊客，大殿上的拉丁文銘刻清晰可見。
photos.location: Vatican City — St. Peter's Square, in front of St. Peter's Basilica, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Pisa, Italy — Piazza dei Miracoli
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of the Leaning Tower of Pisa in Italy, shot from a low angle looking upward against a clear blue sky. The iconic bell tower fills
photos.description_zh: 一張義大利比薩斜塔的旅遊照片，從低角度仰拍，背景是晴朗的藍天。這座著名的鐘樓佔據了大部分畫面，其標誌性的傾斜和羅馬式拱廊建築清晰可見。塔底可見圍欄和一些建築物。
photos.location: Pisa, Italy — Piazza dei Miracoli

photos.location_detail: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy — in front of the Baptistery of St. John (Battistero di San Giovanni)
photos.description_en: A mother and her two teenage children pose in front of the Pisa Baptistery (Battistero di San Giovanni) in Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy. The mothe
photos.description_zh: 一位母親和她的兩個青少年子女在義大利比薩奇蹟廣場的比薩洗禮堂前合影。母親站在左側，穿著粉紅色條紋襯衫，中間是一位少女，右邊是一位穿著深色印花T恤的少年。背景可見其他遊客和金屬圍欄，天空晴朗蔚藍，羅馬式哥德風格的洗禮堂壯觀矗立。
photos.location: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy — in front of the Baptistery of St. John (Battistero di San Giovanni)

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy — Piazza del Duomo, in front of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore
photos.description_en: A travel photo taken in front of the Florence Cathedral (Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore) in Italy. Tourists mill about the piazza on a sunny summ
photos.description_zh: 一張在義大利佛羅倫斯主教座堂（聖母百花大教堂）前拍攝的旅遊照片。晴朗的夏日裡，遊客們在廣場上穿梭，教堂正面右側可見修復工程的鷹架。前景中一位戴太陽眼鏡的女性手持飲料，正與一位穿著淺色上衣的男性交談，四周圍繞著其他遊客。
photos.location: Florence, Italy — Piazza del Duomo, in front of the Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — Teatro Antico di Taormina
photos.description_en: A travel photo showing ancient Greco-Roman ruins, most likely the Teatro Antico di Taormina (Ancient Theatre of Taormina) in Sicily, Italy. The dramat
photos.description_zh: 一張旅遊照片，拍攝的是古希臘羅馬遺跡，極可能是義大利西西里島陶爾米納的古劇場（Teatro Antico di Taormina）。壯觀的岩石峭壁聳立在風化的磚石拱門後方，下方可見柏樹及地中海植被。照片下方可見幾位遊客在遺跡間漫步。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — Teatro Antico di Taormina

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A woman and a teenage boy stand in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, surrounded by the square's famous pigeons. The woman wears a
photos.description_zh: 一位女士和一名青少年男孩站在義大利威尼斯聖馬可廣場上，四周圍繞著廣場上著名的鴿子群。女士穿著紅色花紋上衣和黑色裙子，面帶微笑看向鏡頭；男孩穿著白色T恤和短褲，似乎正在餵鴿子。背景可見聖馬可廣場標誌性的拱廊建築，廣場上遊客眾多，是一張典型的歐洲旅遊紀念照。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy
photos.description_en: A woman poses in front of the Leaning Tower of Pisa and the Pisa Cathedral (Duomo) at the Piazza dei Miracoli in Pisa, Italy. She is wearing a pink st
photos.description_zh: 一位女性在義大利比薩斜塔與比薩大教堂前合影留念。她穿著粉色條紋上衣，在夏日陽光下微微瞇眼，背景可見其他遊客與自行車散布於奇蹟廣場上。
photos.location: Piazza dei Miracoli, Pisa, Italy

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy — Piazzale Michelangelo
photos.description_en: A panoramic view of Florence, Italy taken from Piazzale Michelangelo, showing the iconic skyline including the Duomo (Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fio
photos.description_zh: 從米開朗基羅廣場俯瞰義大利佛羅倫斯的全景照片，可見聖母百花大教堂及布魯內萊斯基圓頂、喬托鐘樓、聖十字聖殿及舊宮塔樓等著名地標。前景為修剪整齊的花園，鮮紅色花壇點綴其中。拍攝於夏季，天空略顯朦朧。
photos.location: Florence, Italy — Piazzale Michelangelo

photos.location_detail: Piazza di Santa Croce, Florence, Italy
photos.description_en: Three family members pose together in Piazza di Santa Croce in Florence, Italy, with the iconic Gothic facade of the Basilica di Santa Croce behind th
photos.description_zh: 三位家人在義大利佛羅倫斯的聖十字廣場合影，身後是著名的聖十字聖殿哥德式立面。左邊是一位穿著黑色圖案T恤的男孩，中間是一位穿著花紋上衣的年輕女性，右邊是一位穿著粉紅色條紋襯衫和深色裙子、手提藏青色手提包的女性。當天陽光明媚，背景中可見其他遊客。
photos.location: Piazza di Santa Croce, Florence, Italy

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy - Baptistery of San Giovanni (Gates of Paradise)
photos.description_en: A close-up photograph of Lorenzo Ghiberti's "Gates of Paradise" (Porta del Paradiso) on the Florence Baptistery in Italy. The image captures several g
photos.description_zh: 這是一張佛羅倫斯聖若望洗禮堂上吉貝爾蒂「天堂之門」的近距離照片。畫面中可見數塊鍍金青銅浮雕板，描繪聖經故事場景，兩側的壁龕中立有先知與女先知雕像，浮雕板之間則飾有圓形肖像浮雕。
photos.location: Florence, Italy - Baptistery of San Giovanni (Gates of Paradise)

photos.location_detail: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence, Italy
photos.description_en: A woman poses for a photo at Piazzale Michelangelo in Florence, Italy, with the iconic Florence skyline behind her including the Duomo (Cathedral of S
photos.description_zh: 一位女士在義大利佛羅倫斯的米開朗基羅廣場拍照留念，身後可見佛羅倫斯著名的天際線，包括聖母百花大教堂的圓頂和聖十字聖殿。她身穿粉白條紋短袖襯衫搭配深藍色裙子，肩背手提包。照片攝於晴朗的夏日，遠處山巒隱約可見。
photos.location: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence, Italy

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — inside the Colosseum
photos.description_en: A man poses for a photo inside the Roman Colosseum in Rome, Italy on a clear summer day. He stands in the lower level of the amphitheater with the ico
photos.description_zh: 一位男士在義大利羅馬的羅馬競技場內合影留念，當天天氣晴朗。他站在競技場的下層，身後是壯觀的多層拱形牆面，背景中可見其他遊客。照片具有典型的九零年代底片沖印風格，右下角有橘色日期戳記。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — inside the Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — near the Arch of Constantine, adjacent to the Colosseum
photos.description_en: A young woman poses in front of the Arch of Constantine in Rome, Italy, wearing a white souvenir t-shirt with a printed design. The photo was taken on
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕女性站在羅馬君士坦丁凱旋門前合影，身穿白色紀念T恤。照片拍攝於晴朗的夏日，背景可見其他遊客及羅馬典型的傘松樹，凱旋門右側還隱約可見羅馬競技場的一角。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — near the Arch of Constantine, adjacent to the Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy - Roman Colosseum (interior)
photos.description_en: A man poses for a photo inside the Roman Colosseum in Rome, Italy on a clear sunny day. He is wearing a casual light-colored striped polo shirt and sm
photos.description_zh: 一位男士在晴朗的天氣下，於義大利羅馬競技場內拍照留念。他穿著淺色條紋Polo衫，面帶微笑地對著鏡頭，身後是競技場標誌性的多層拱門結構及露出的地下通道。背景中可見其他遊客正在參觀這座古蹟。
photos.location: Rome, Italy - Roman Colosseum (interior)

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Colosseum (Colosseo)
photos.description_en: Interior view of the Roman Colosseum taken from an upper level, showing the exposed underground hypogeum (subterranean passages and chambers) beneath
photos.description_zh: 從羅馬競技場上層拍攝的內部景觀，可清楚看到競技場地板下方暴露的地下通道與房間結構。多層拱形牆壁在晴朗的藍天下氣勢磅礴，中景處可見一小群遊客在步道上參觀。這張照片攝於一個晴朗的夏日，應為歐洲旅遊期間所拍。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Colosseum (Colosseo)

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Arch of Constantine, near the Colosseum
photos.description_en: A young Asian girl, approximately 12-14 years old, poses in front of the Arch of Constantine in Rome, Italy. She wears a white tourist-style t-shirt w
photos.description_zh: 一位約十二至十四歲的亞洲女孩站在羅馬君士坦丁凱旋門前拍照留念。她穿著一件白色印花T恤，長髮隨風飄揚。背景可見其他遊客及羅馬競技場的一角，是個晴朗的夏日。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Arch of Constantine, near the Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi)
photos.description_en: A father and teenage son pose together in front of the Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi) in Rome, Italy on a bright summer day. The father wears a whi
photos.description_zh: 父子倆在晴朗的夏日於羅馬許願池（特雷維噴泉）前合影。父親穿著白色polo衫，肩上扛著攝影機；兒子穿著灰色「Pirate Surf」T恤，看起來是青少年。背景可見巴洛克風格的噴泉雕塑、波利宮，以及其他遊客。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Trevi Fountain (Fontana di Trevi)

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Arch of Constantine, near the Colosseum and Roman Forum
photos.description_en: A middle-aged Asian man in a white polo shirt poses in front of the Arch of Constantine in Rome, Italy. The iconic triumphal arch with its ornate reli
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子身穿白色polo衫，在義大利羅馬的君士坦丁凱旋門前留影。這座雄偉的凱旋門及其精美浮雕佔據了背景，左側可見古羅馬廣場的遺跡。晴朗的夏日裡，附近還有其他遊客經過。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Arch of Constantine, near the Colosseum and Roman Forum

photos.location_detail: Vatican City, Rome, Italy — St. Peter's Basilica and St. Peter's Square
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of St. Peter's Basilica in Vatican City, taken from across the cobblestone road approaching St. Peter's Square. The iconic Renaiss
photos.description_zh: 一張梵蒂岡聖伯多祿大殿的旅遊照片，從聖伯多祿廣場前方的鵝卵石道路拍攝。文藝復興風格的宏偉正面與圓頂清晰可見，廣場中央的埃及方尖碑和右側貝尼尼的柱廊也一併入鏡。前方道路上停有一輛觀光巴士、幾輛汽車和一輛黃色計程車。
photos.location: Vatican City, Rome, Italy — St. Peter's Basilica and St. Peter's Square

photos.location_detail: Vatican City - St. Peter's Square (Piazza San Pietro), Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: A woman stands in front of a railing at St. Peter's Basilica in Vatican City, with the iconic St. Peter's Square (Piazza San Pietro), its Egyptian obe
photos.description_zh: 一位女士站在梵蒂岡聖伯多祿大殿前的欄杆旁，身後可見聖伯多祿廣場、埃及方尖碑及貝尼尼設計的柱廊。她穿著深藍色短袖上衣，肩背手提包，在夏日晴朗的天氣下拍攝旅遊紀念照。
photos.location: Vatican City - St. Peter's Square (Piazza San Pietro), Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy - inside the Colosseum
photos.description_en: A woman in a blue top smiles at the camera while standing inside the Roman Colosseum in Rome, Italy. The ancient amphitheater's iconic multi-tiered ar
photos.description_zh: 一位穿著藍色上衣的女性在羅馬競技場內對著鏡頭微笑。背景可見古羅馬圓形競技場標誌性的多層拱門結構，以及許多在晴朗夏日觀光的遊客。照片日期印記顯示為1993年8月20日。
photos.location: Rome, Italy - inside the Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Roman Colosseum (Colosseo)
photos.description_en: Interior view of the Roman Colosseum taken from the upper seating area, showing the iconic multi-tiered arched walls and the exposed underground hypog
photos.description_zh: 從羅馬競技場上層座位區拍攝的內部景觀，可見多層拱形牆面及地下通道（hypogeum）的遺跡。左下角有幾位遊客，其中一人戴白色帽子，另一人穿青綠色上衣，在晴朗的夏日裡參觀這座歷史古蹟。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Roman Colosseum (Colosseo)

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Colosseum
photos.description_en: A group of tourists stands in front of the Colosseum in Rome, Italy on a bright summer day. Several people are taking photos or looking around at the
photos.description_zh: 一群遊客在晴朗的夏日站在義大利羅馬的競技場前方。多位遊客正在拍照或觀賞這座古蹟，穿著九零年代初期典型的夏季休閒服裝。背景中可以清楚看到競技場標誌性的拱門和多層結構。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — inside the Colosseum
photos.description_en: A boy, approximately 10-12 years old, stands posing inside the Roman Colosseum in Rome, Italy. He is wearing a gray oversized t-shirt, plaid shorts, a
photos.description_zh: 一位約十到十二歲的男孩站在義大利羅馬競技場內擺姿勢拍照。他身穿灰色寬鬆T恤、格子短褲和白色運動鞋，站在高處的走道上，身後可見古羅馬圓形競技場的拱門結構和地下通道遺跡。背景中可見其他遊客，天氣晴朗，是一個夏日的旅遊場景。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — inside the Colosseum

photos.location_detail: Vatican Museums, Cortile della Pigna, Vatican City, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: A teenage girl stands smiling in front of Arnaldo Pomodoro's famous "Sphere Within Sphere" bronze sculpture in the Cortile della Pigna courtyard of th
photos.description_zh: 一位少女站在梵蒂岡博物館松果庭院中，微笑著在阿納爾多·波莫多羅著名的「球中球」青銅雕塑前合影。她穿著白色圖案T恤和淺藍色牛仔褲，是典型的九零年代休閒風格。背景可見梵蒂岡庭院的文藝復興建築和修剪整齊的草坪。
photos.location: Vatican Museums, Cortile della Pigna, Vatican City, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Vatican City, Rome, Italy — St. Peter's Basilica and St. Peter's Square
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of St. Peter's Basilica in Vatican City, taken from across the cobblestone road approaching St. Peter's Square. The iconic Renaiss
photos.description_zh: 一張梵蒂岡聖伯多祿大殿的旅遊照片，從通往聖伯多祿廣場的石板路對面拍攝。文藝復興時期的圓頂和正面外牆居中呈現，前方可見埃及方尖碑。晴朗的夏日天空下，路旁停著一輛遊覽車和幾輛轎車。
photos.location: Vatican City, Rome, Italy — St. Peter's Basilica and St. Peter's Square

photos.location_detail: St. Peter's Basilica, Vatican City, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of Michelangelo's Pietà sculpture inside St. Peter's Basilica in Vatican City. The famous marble sculpture depicting the Virgin Ma
photos.description_zh: 這是一張在梵蒂岡聖伯多祿大殿內拍攝的旅遊照片，畫面中是米開朗基羅著名的《聖殤》大理石雕塑。聖母瑪利亞懷抱耶穌遺體的雕像安置在防彈玻璃後方，背後深色大理石牆面上掛著一座白色大十字架。大殿內部粉紅與白色相間的大理石裝飾十分醒目。
photos.location: St. Peter's Basilica, Vatican City, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Vatican Museums, Cortile della Pigna, Vatican City, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: A man poses in the Cortile della Pigna (Pine Cone Courtyard) at the Vatican Museums in Rome, Italy. The iconic bronze pine cone sculpture is visible i
photos.description_zh: 一位男士在梵蒂岡博物館的松果庭院（Cortile della Pigna）前留影。身後巨大的半圓形壁龕中可見著名的青銅松果雕塑。晴朗的夏日裡，背景中還可以看到其他遊客，包括一位女士和一個小孩。
photos.location: Vatican Museums, Cortile della Pigna, Vatican City, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Circus Maximus area looking toward Palatine Hill
photos.description_en: A travel photograph of ancient Roman ruins, likely the Palatine Hill and the remains of the imperial palaces, viewed from the Circus Maximus area in R
photos.description_zh: 一張旅遊照片，拍攝的是羅馬古蹟，應為從大競技場（Circus Maximus）方向望向帕拉蒂尼山（Palatine Hill）上的皇宮遺址。巨大的磚石拱形結構在晴朗的藍天下十分壯觀，遺址後方可見地中海松樹。前景有木製柵欄，畫面左側邊緣可見一根路燈柱。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Circus Maximus area looking toward Palatine Hill

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy (overlooking Giardini Naxos bay)
photos.description_en: Three family members pose at a scenic hilltop overlook with a sweeping panoramic view of a Mediterranean coastal bay, mountains, and town below. A man
photos.description_zh: 三位家庭成員在山頂觀景台上合影，身後是壯麗的地中海海灣全景，可見山脈、海岸線和山下的城鎮。左側有一位男性部分入鏡，旁邊是穿著深色背心的少女和一位較年幼的男孩，三人都面帶笑容。乾燥的山坡、弧形海灘和沿海聚落的景觀，與西西里島陶爾米納俯瞰賈爾迪尼納克索斯灣的景色非常相似。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy (overlooking Giardini Naxos bay)

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely viewed from near the Greek Theatre or a hillside overlook toward the Bay of Naxos
photos.description_en: A panoramic landscape photograph taken from an elevated hillside viewpoint overlooking a sweeping Mediterranean coastline. Tall Italian cypress trees
photos.description_zh: 從高處俯瞰地中海沿岸的全景風景照。前景是茂密的義大利柏樹和綠色植被，遠處可見一個弧形海灣和沿海城鎮延伸至朦朧的遠方。景色與西西里島陶爾米納（Taormina）眺望納克索斯灣（Bay of Naxos）的景觀一致。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely viewed from near the Greek Theatre or a hillside overlook toward the Bay of Naxos

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely at or near the Greek Theatre overlook
photos.description_en: Three people — a father and two children (a teenage girl and a younger boy) — pose at a scenic overlook at what appears to be Taormina, Sicily, with a
photos.description_zh: 一位父親帶著兩個孩子——一名青少年女孩和一名較年幼的男孩——在一處風景觀景台前合影，背景是壯觀的山頂城堡和沿山而建的地中海小鎮，看起來像是義大利西西里島的陶爾米納。前景可見古老的磚石遺跡，可能是陶爾米納希臘劇場的一部分。一家人穿著夏日休閒服裝，在晴朗微霧的天氣下觀光旅遊。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely at or near the Greek Theatre overlook

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy (or similar southern Italian Mediterranean coast)
photos.description_en: A scenic coastal landscape photographed from a hillside overlook, showing Mediterranean-style buildings with terracotta tile roofs nestled among cypre
photos.description_zh: 從山丘高處俯瞰地中海沿岸風景，可見紅瓦屋頂的建築散落在柏樹、棕櫚樹和仙人掌之間。左側有突出的岩石海岬，平靜湛藍的海面延伸至朦朧的天際線。建築風格與植被特徵顯示這很可能是義大利西西里島的陶爾米納或類似的南義海岸小鎮。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy (or similar southern Italian Mediterranean coast)

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely the ancient Greek Theater (Teatro Antico)
photos.description_en: A woman poses smiling at ancient Mediterranean ruins, likely the Greek Theater (Teatro Antico) in Taormina, Sicily, Italy. She wears a red polka-dot b
photos.description_zh: 一位女士在地中海古蹟前微笑合影，地點可能是義大利西西里島陶爾米納的古希臘劇場遺址。她身穿紅色圓點襯衫和深色短裙，背著肩包，身後是古老的石牆、山巒和藍天白雲。照片日期印記為1993年8月21日。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy — likely the ancient Greek Theater (Teatro Antico)

photos.location_detail: European museum, likely Italy or Greece (classical sculpture gallery)
photos.description_en: A couple poses together inside a European museum with a classical Greco-Roman statue visible behind them. The woman wears a black floral top and dark
photos.description_zh: 一對夫婦在歐洲博物館內合影，身後可見一座古希臘羅馬風格的雕像。女士穿著黑色碎花上衣和深色短褲，手持疑似旅遊指南；男士穿著淺藍色條紋Polo衫和牛仔短褲。寬敞的展廳中可見其他遊客，雕像前方設有繩索護欄。
photos.location: European museum, likely Italy or Greece (classical sculpture gallery)

photos.location_detail: Taormina, Sicily, Italy
photos.description_en: A woman in a red polka-dot blouse and sunglasses poses at a scenic overlook above a Mediterranean hillside town, likely Taormina, Sicily. The panorami
photos.description_zh: 一位女士身穿紅色圓點襯衫、戴著太陽眼鏡，在地中海山城的觀景台上拍照留念，背景很可能是義大利西西里島的陶爾米納。身後可見密集的白色與赭紅色屋頂建築沿著山坡層層排列，柏樹、棕櫚樹點綴其間，遠方山巒在薄霧中若隱若現。她靠在金屬欄杆旁，面帶微笑，享受夏日旅行的時光。
photos.location: Taormina, Sicily, Italy

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy — Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square)
photos.description_en: A family of four poses together in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, with St. Mark's Basilica and the Doge's Palace visible in th
photos.description_zh: 一家四口在義大利威尼斯的聖馬可廣場合影，背景可見聖馬可大教堂的圓頂和總督宮的哥德式拱廊。夏日晴天，廣場上遊客眾多，旁邊擺放著露天咖啡座椅。全家人穿著輕便的夏季旅行服裝，享受歐洲之旅。
photos.location: Venice, Italy — Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square)

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A middle-aged man poses in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy. The iconic Doge's Palace is visible on the left, and the two famous
photos.description_zh: 一位中年男子在義大利威尼斯的聖馬可廣場前留影。左側可見著名的總督宮，背景中矗立著聖馬可和聖托達羅的兩根圓柱。廣場上擠滿了遊客，地面上有許多當時聖馬可廣場特有的鴿子群。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy — Piazza San Marco / Piazzetta San Marco
photos.description_en: A bustling summer scene at Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy. The two iconic columns of the Piazzetta — the Lion of St. Mark and S
photos.description_zh: 夏日的威尼斯聖馬可廣場，遊客熙來攘往。背景中可見小廣場兩根著名的圓柱——聖馬可飛獅柱和聖狄奧多柱，以及對岸的聖乔治馬焦雷島教堂。前景中一位穿著色彩繽紛花卉披肩、背著背包的女性尤為醒目。
photos.location: Venice, Italy — Piazza San Marco / Piazzetta San Marco

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A young Asian girl stands smiling in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, surrounded by dozens of pigeons. She wears a white ASICS t
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕的亞洲女孩站在威尼斯聖馬可廣場上，面帶微笑，周圍滿是鴿子。她穿著白色ASICS T恤和淺色短裙。背景可見聖馬可大教堂標誌性的拜占庭式圓頂，一位戴草帽、穿暗紅色上衣的男子背對鏡頭站在附近，廣場上滿是來自各地的遊客。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A busy summer day at Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy. The iconic St. Mark's Basilica dominates the background with its Byzantine
photos.description_zh: 義大利威尼斯聖馬可廣場的夏日景象。背景中可見聖馬可大教堂標誌性的拜占庭式圓頂與華麗外牆，右側的鐘樓上有施工鷹架。廣場上擠滿了觀光客，地上有威尼斯著名的鴿子群。畫面右側可見兩名亞洲年輕男子，其中一人穿著圖案T恤。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy — bridge overlooking the Bridge of Sighs (Ponte dei Sospiri)
photos.description_en: A man in his 40s poses on a bridge in Venice, Italy, with the famous Bridge of Sighs (Ponte dei Sospiri) visible in the background spanning a narrow c
photos.description_zh: 一位四十多歲的男士在義大利威尼斯的橋上拍照留念，背景可見著名的嘆息橋橫跨狹窄運河連接兩棟建築。他身穿淺藍色短袖襯衫配藍色長褲。周圍可見其他觀光客，包括一位穿著乾乾淨淨「Here Today Gone to Hell」搖滾樂團T恤、戴著密西根大學棒球帽的年輕人。
photos.location: Venice, Italy — bridge overlooking the Bridge of Sighs (Ponte dei Sospiri)

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: Two women pose together in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, surrounded by the square's famous pigeons. The older woman in a red
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性在義大利威尼斯聖馬可廣場合影，廣場上滿是著名的鴿子群。年長的女性穿著紅色上衣，雙手伸出讓鴿子停在手上；年輕女性穿著黑色上衣和牛仔短褲，站在一旁微笑。背景可見聖馬可大教堂的拜占庭式建築，以及大量遊客與鴿子。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: Two women and a child stand in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, surrounded by the square's famous pigeons. The older woman in a
photos.description_zh: 兩位女性和一個孩子站在義大利威尼斯的聖馬可廣場上，廣場上到處都是著名的鴿子。穿紅色上衣的年長女性正在餵一隻停在她手上的鴿子，而穿深色上衣和牛仔短褲的年輕女性在一旁笑著觀看。背景可見聖馬可大教堂華麗的外觀以及眾多遊客。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy — view from near St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco) waterfront looking toward San Giorgio Maggiore island
photos.description_en: A scenic view across the Venetian lagoon toward the island of San Giorgio Maggiore, with its iconic bell tower and Palladian church clearly visible th
photos.description_zh: 從威尼斯聖馬可廣場附近的水岸眺望對面的聖乍治馬焦雷島，島上標誌性的鐘樓和帕拉底歐式教堂在夏日薄霧中清晰可見。瀉湖上有多艘船隻和水上計程車來往穿梭，前景處一位船夫正操控著傳統貢多拉，旁邊是一排停靠在木樁邊、蓋著帆布的貢多拉。這張照片攝於1993年夏天的威尼斯旅行期間。
photos.location: Venice, Italy — view from near St. Mark's Square (Piazza San Marco) waterfront looking toward San Giorgio Maggiore island

photos.location_detail: Vatican City — St. Peter's Basilica, St. Peter's Square, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: Two Asian males, likely a father and teenage son, pose together in front of St. Peter's Basilica in Vatican City, Rome. The grand facade with its dist
photos.description_zh: 兩位亞裔男性，看起來是父子，在梵蒂岡聖伯多祿大殿前合影留念。大殿壯觀的正面外觀清晰可見，包括宏偉的圓柱、屋頂上的聖人雕像以及拉丁文銘刻。晴朗的夏日裡，聖伯多祿廣場上遊客眾多。
photos.location: Vatican City — St. Peter's Basilica, St. Peter's Square, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy — Basilica of Santa Croce (Basilica di Santa Croce)
photos.description_en: A photograph of the tomb of Galileo Galilei inside the Basilica of Santa Croce in Florence, Italy. The elaborate marble monument features a bust of Ga
photos.description_zh: 這張照片拍攝的是位於義大利佛羅倫斯聖十字大殿內的伽利略墓。華麗的大理石紀念碑上方有伽利略的半身像，石棺兩側分別有代表天文學和幾何學的女性雕像。底部刻有拉丁文銘文，記載伽利略的生平與成就。
photos.location: Florence, Italy — Basilica of Santa Croce (Basilica di Santa Croce)

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: Two Asian women pose in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, with the iconic Byzantine facade of St. Mark's Basilica visible behind
photos.description_zh: 兩位亞裔女性在義大利威尼斯的聖馬可廣場合影，身後可見聖馬可大教堂著名的拜占庭式建築外觀。年長的女性穿著紅色圓點襯衫搭配黑色裙子，手持捲起的紙張或地圖；年輕女性穿著黑色上衣站在她身後。廣場上滿是夏日遊客、鴿子，教堂一側還可見施工鷹架。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy — Piazza del Duomo, in front of the Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore
photos.description_en: A man poses for a travel photo in front of the Florence Cathedral (Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore) in Italy. The ornate Gothic Renaissance marble
photos.description_zh: 一位男士在義大利佛羅倫斯聖母百花大教堂前留影。教堂華麗的哥德式文藝復興風格大理石立面清晰可見，以綠色、粉色和白色大理石面板著稱，旁邊可見修復工程的鷹架。廣場上遊客熙來攘往，看來是一個明亮的夏日。
photos.location: Florence, Italy — Piazza del Duomo, in front of the Cattedrale di Santa Maria del Fiore

photos.location_detail: Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: Two teenagers, likely siblings, pose on a white stone bridge over a canal in Venice, Italy. The girl wears a dark long-sleeve top with denim shorts an
photos.description_zh: 兩位青少年（看起來像是兄妹）站在威尼斯一座白色石橋上合影，背後是經典的威尼斯運河與兩旁的古老建築。女孩穿著深色長袖上衣搭配牛仔短褲和涼鞋，男孩穿著白色印花T恤和灰色短褲。這是一張充滿夏日旅遊氛圍的家庭照片。
photos.location: Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Basilica di Santa Croce, Florence, Italy
photos.description_en: A photograph of Michelangelo's tomb inside the Basilica di Santa Croce in Florence, Italy. The ornate marble monument features allegorical seated figu
photos.description_zh: 這是一張在義大利佛羅倫斯聖十字聖殿內拍攝的米開朗基羅之墓的照片。華麗的大理石墓碑上有代表建築、雕塑和繪畫藝術的寓言坐像，深色大理石石棺，以及上方米開朗基羅的胸像。基座上的拉丁文銘文提及了布歐納羅蒂家族與科西莫·德·麥地奇。
photos.location: Basilica di Santa Croce, Florence, Italy

photos.location_detail: St. Peter's Square, Vatican City, Rome, Italy
photos.description_en: A travel photo taken at St. Peter's Square in Vatican City, Rome, with the iconic facade and dome of St. Peter's Basilica prominently visible in the b
photos.description_zh: 在梵蒂岡聖彼得廣場拍攝的旅遊照片，背景是壯觀的聖彼得大教堂正面與圓頂。在眾多遊客中，右側可見一個亞洲家庭——一位年輕女性、旁邊一位年輕人，以及一位年長男性，看起來正在歐洲度假。明亮的夏日陽光照耀著整個廣場，與八月的氣候相符。
photos.location: St. Peter's Square, Vatican City, Rome, Italy

photos.location_detail: Florence, Italy - likely Via de' Tornabuoni or a similar historic center street
photos.description_en: A street scene in what appears to be Florence, Italy, showing a narrow pedestrian street flanked by tall Renaissance-era stone palazzo buildings with
photos.description_zh: 這張照片拍攝於一條疑似義大利佛羅倫斯的街道，兩旁是高聳的文藝復興時期石造建築，窗戶裝有百葉窗。數位遊客和行人穿著夏季服裝走在鋪石街道上，遠處可見一座紀念柱，可能位於聖三一廣場附近。
photos.location: Florence, Italy - likely Via de' Tornabuoni or a similar historic center street

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A young man of East Asian descent stands smiling in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy, wearing a white Asics t-shirt and gray shor
photos.description_zh: 一位年輕的東亞裔男子穿著白色Asics T恤和灰色短褲，站在義大利威尼斯聖馬可廣場上微笑著。背景是壯麗的聖馬可大教堂，其拜占庭式圓頂和華麗拱門清晰可見，右側則是鐘樓的一部分。廣場上滿是觀光客和鴿子，這是禁止餵鴿前聖馬可廣場的經典景象。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence (Firenze), Italy
photos.description_en: Three family members pose at Piazzale Michelangelo in Florence, Italy, with the iconic Brunelleschi dome of the Florence Cathedral (Duomo di Santa Mar
photos.description_zh: 三位家人在義大利佛羅倫斯的米開朗基羅廣場合影，身後可見著名的聖母百花大教堂圓頂及佛羅倫斯城市全景。一位長髮少女、一位中年男子和一位少年在夏日微霧中並肩而立。照片右側可見標有「FIRENZE」的投幣式望遠鏡。
photos.location: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence (Firenze), Italy

photos.location_detail: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence, Italy
photos.description_en: A family of three poses at Piazzale Michelangelo in Florence, Italy, with the iconic city skyline and the Duomo (Cathedral of Santa Maria del Fiore) v
photos.description_zh: 一家三口在義大利佛羅倫斯的米開朗基羅廣場合影，背景可見著名的聖母百花大教堂圓頂及整座城市的天際線。左邊是一位長髮少女，中間是一位中年男子，右邊是一位少年，三人穿著輕便的夏季服裝。這張照片記錄了一家人歐洲暑期旅行的珍貴時刻。
photos.location: Piazzale Michelangelo, Florence, Italy

photos.location_detail: Europe - likely Italy (upscale restaurant in a historic building)
photos.description_en: A family dinner at an elegant European restaurant, likely in Italy, featuring blue-gray textured walls, a large octagonal classical oil painting, and
photos.description_zh: 一家人在一間優雅的歐洲餐廳用餐，餐廳牆壁為藍灰色，掛有一幅大型八角形古典油畫，旁邊有精緻的木製餐具櫃和燭台。一位亞洲女性、一位約十至十二歲的女孩，以及一位穿白色襯衫的亞洲男性圍坐在鋪有白色桌布的餐桌旁，桌上擺著酒杯和酒瓶，旁邊還坐著一位年長的西方男士。背景中可見其他用餐客人。
photos.location: Europe - likely Italy (upscale restaurant in a historic building)

photos.location_detail: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy
photos.description_en: A family vacation photo taken in Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square) in Venice, Italy. Two young people — a teenage girl in a black top and denim sho
photos.description_zh: 一張在義大利威尼斯聖馬可廣場拍攝的家庭旅遊照片。兩位年輕人——一位穿著黑色上衣和牛仔短褲的少女，以及一位穿著紅色上衣的孩子——站在廣場上著名的鴿群之間，身後是聖馬可大教堂華麗的拜占庭圓頂和哥德式拱門。夏日的廣場上擠滿了來自各地的遊客。
photos.location: Piazza San Marco (St. Mark's Square), Venice, Italy

photos.location_detail: Rome, Italy — Castel Sant'Angelo and Ponte Sant'Angelo, viewed from Ponte Vittorio Emanuele II
photos.description_en: A travel photo of Castel Sant'Angelo (the cylindrical fortress) and the Ponte Sant'Angelo bridge spanning the Tiber River in Rome, Italy. The photo is
photos.description_zh: 一張拍攝於義大利羅馬的旅遊照片，畫面中可見聖天使城堡（圓柱形堡壘）與橫跨台伯河的聖天使橋。照片從鄰近的橋上拍攝，前景可見石造欄杆。夏日晴朗，天空略帶薄霧。
photos.location: Rome, Italy — Castel Sant'Angelo and Ponte Sant'Angelo, viewed from Ponte Vittorio Emanuele II
